data.title: North America's smart metering industry sees second-wave rollouts with 75% share by 2030. Asia-Pacific leads, NA ranks third.
data.description: In Dublin, the "Smart Metering in North America - 7th Edition" report is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. Smart metering is essential for future smart grids and is being implemented globally. Asia-Pacific leads the market, with North America ranking third after Europe. The report details the growth of smart meter deployment in developed and developing nations.

data.title: Ethereum turns 10 with rising demand and activity: Daily active addresses hit second-highest level of 2025, 680,670 wallets active. Whale activity surges with 14,628 transactions over $100,000 and wallets holding between 10,000-100,000 ETH accumulate 1.55 million ETH in three weeks. Ethereum ranks 10th in daily GitHub events with 157 major updates.
data.description: The Ethereum network recently marked its tenth anniversary, with analytics platform Santiment reporting an increase in demand and activity. According to Santiment data shared on July 30, Ethereum saw a surge in daily active addresses, reaching the second-highest level of the year at 680,670 on July 27. Mean Value to Realized Value (MVRV) data indicated significant unrealized gains for traders, with a +38% increase for annual active wallets and +15% for monthly ones. Whale activity also intensified, with 14,628 transactions exceeding $100,000, the fourth-highest volume in the current year. Wallets holding between 10,000–100,000 ETH acquired 1.55 million ETH in just three weeks, signifying strong buying activity. Additionally, Ethereum holds the 10th position in daily GitHub events with 157 significant... (For complete details, please refer to the Benzinga website)

data.title: Six new escalators added to NYC subway stations by Entuitive, enhancing accessibility and flow. Major milestone in MTA upgrades.
data.description: New York City's MTA infrastructure reached a significant milestone with the completion of major subway station upgrades, where the lead designer Entuitive provided structural and construction engineering services. The project included the installation of six escalators in total. This achievement was celebrated with a launch event in New York on July 31, 2025.

data.title: SKYX reports Q2 2025 revenues of $23.1M, up from $20.1M in Q1, showing market penetration growth.
data.description: Leading technology company SKYX has made an early announcement regarding their exceptional financial performance in the second quarter of 2025. The company reported record revenues amounting to $23.1 million for the quarter, marking a significant increase from the $20.1 million generated in the first quarter of the same year. This notable growth in revenue demonstrates SKYX's continued success and expansion in the market.

data.title: XRP surged 42% in July to $3.09, reaching a market cap of $183.4 billion. Analysts predict a potential breakout to $3.60.
data.description: XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) has experienced a significant 42% surge in the last month, driven by positive market sentiment and advancements in regulatory policies. The current price for XRP stands at $3.09 with a market cap of $183.4 billion, representing a 7-day decrease of 1.4%. On the other hand, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is priced at $118,126.96, boasting a market cap of $2.35 trillion and a minor 7-day increase of 0.09%. Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) is currently valued at $3,779.30, with a market cap of $456.2 billion and a 7-day growth of 4%.Crypto expert Ali Martinez has identified a potential double bottom pattern on XRP’s 4-hour chart. Confirmation of a breakout above $3.30 could signal a significant price rally towards $3.60. Martinez suggests that XRP may be on the verge of forming a double bottom formation, underlining the importance of breaching the $3.30 mark for potential further upside towards $3.60. For more insights, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Appeals court overturns conviction of Nathaniel Chastain for wire fraud and money laundering in OpenSea insider trading case.
data.description: Nathaniel Chastain, a former employee at OpenSea, has effectively appealed his conviction for wire fraud and money laundering. The case involved significant amounts of money and legal proceedings, but Chastain was able to overturn the initial judgment.

data.title: Global Partners LP offers 2024 Schedule K-3 online for unitholders with international tax relevance, available at www.taxpackagesupport.com/globalpartners.
data.description: In Waltham, Massachusetts, Global Partners LP (NYSE: GLP) disclosed the availability of its 2024 Schedule K-3, containing essential international tax details. The Schedule K-3 can be accessed online by unitholders at www.taxpackagesupport.com/globalpartners. This information is particularly useful for a subset of unitholders, including foreign unitholders, those claiming a foreign tax credit on their tax filings, and specific corporate or partnership unitholders.

data.title: Mastercard (NYSE: MA) reports Q2 net revenues of $8.13 billion, up 17% Y/Y, beats analyst estimate. Adjusted EPS rose to $4.15.
data.description: Mastercard (NYSE: MA) released its fiscal second-quarter results, posting quarterly net revenues of $8.13 billion, showing a 17% increase year-over-year and 16% on a neutral currency basis. This surpassed analyst expectations of $7.95 billion. Adjusted EPS also saw a 16% year-over-year rise to $4.15, exceeding the analyst consensus of $4.02. Payment network net revenue grew by 13% year-over-year in both reported and currency-neutral terms, driven by increases in gross dollar volume (+9% Y/Y), cross-border volume (+15% Y/Y), and switched transactions (+10% Y/Y). Mastercard also announced the launch of new benefits and an ultra-exclusive card for high spenders. This and more can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: e& reports 60.7% net profit increase to AED 8.8 billion in H1 2025, with Q2 revenue at AED 18.0 billion and net profit at AED 3.5 billion.
data.description: In the first half of 2025, e& announced its financial results with significant growth. Consolidated revenue reached AED 34.9 billion, up 23.3% from H1 2024. Consolidated net profit rose to AED 8.8 billion, a 60.7% increase over the previous year. EBITDA for H1 was AED 15.4 billion with a margin of 44.1%. The company's subscriber base globally grew to 198 million, a 13.1% increase year-on-year. In the UAE specifically, e& had 15.5 million subscribers driven by the demand for advanced connectivity solutions and digital services. Q2 saw revenue of AED 18.0 billion, a 28.1% increase from the previous year, alongside a net profit of AED 3.5 billion, up by 9.7%. EBITDA in Q2 was AED 8.0 billion, marking a year-on-year growth of 22.2%. This performance solidifies e&'s position as a global tech leader facilitating digital transformation.

data.title: NMQF released article on Medicare payment rules violating biological laws, worsening kidney care disparities in minority communities.
data.description: The National Minority Quality Forum (NMQF) unveiled the latest article in its Health Affairs series on the Physical Laws Framework (PLF). This innovative approach assesses healthcare policies against fundamental biological laws. The new article, titled "Payment Systems Violate the Physics of Life: How ESRD Bundle Policies Disrupt Biological Order in Minority Communities," sheds light on the impact of policies on minority communities. This is the second installment in the series, emphasizing the importance of aligning healthcare policies with biological principles.

data.title: Novo Nordisk's stock plunges 25%, sales forecast down 8-14%, operating profit down 10-16%, shares down 35% YTD and 65% from 2023 high.
data.description: Danish pharma company Novo Nordisk A/S (NYSE: NVO) experienced a record-breaking decline in its stock value, dropping by 25% in European markets following an unexpected profit warning linked to its renowned obesity drug Wegovy. Alongside this news, the company welcomed a new CEO. Novo Nordisk now projects a sales growth of 8%-14% for 2025, down from the previous range of 13%-21%, and has revised its operating profit forecast to 10%-16%, previously at 16%-24%. This marks the second guidance reduction this year. With a year-to-date decline of 35% and a staggering 65% plunge from its peak in June 2023, the company has lost billions of dollars in market capitalization. Analyst James Quigley from Goldman Sachs highlighted that the lowered expectations were due to persistent challenges with semaglutide and slower commercial advancement for both. Full details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Staples and Verizon to expand partnership to 35 stores, offering internet, phone, and tech services.
data.description: A new partnership between Staples and Verizon is set to launch services in 35 Staples stores in Framingham, Massachusetts. The collaboration will provide internet, phone, and tech services catering to small business owners and regular customers. The expansion aims to enhance the availability of these services for a wider audience.

United States informed the United Nations Security Council that President Trump has emphasized the need for a resolution to end Russia’s conflict in Ukraine by August 8. The US also stated it is ready to take further actions to ensure peace in Ukraine.

data.title: Conviction of wire fraud and money laundering overturned for ex-OpenSea worker Nathaniel Chastain after successful appeal.
data.description: Nathaniel Chastain, a former employee of OpenSea, has recently overturned his conviction for wire fraud and money laundering. The decision marks a significant development in the case, highlighting potential flaws in the initial judgment. Chastain's successful appeal has sparked discussions about the fairness of the legal process and could set a precedent for similar cases in the future. This turn of events comes after Chastain was found guilty of these charges and faced a potential sentence of several years. The implications of this reversal could have far-reaching consequences for both Chastain and other individuals involved in similar legal battles.

data.title: Inventor from Freeland, PA creates appliance power saver BDH-1037 to reduce heating/cooling costs using outside temp.
data.description: A resident of Freeland, Pennsylvania, introduced a new innovative idea on July 31, 2025, to leverage outdoor temperatures in regulating indoor appliance temperatures, aiming to reduce power consumption. Heating and cooling, responsible for significant energy usage in homes, can potentially benefit from harnessing external weather conditions. The inventor suggested a method to freeze, cool, or heat appliances by utilizing the prevailing outdoor temperature. This groundbreaking concept could significantly impact energy conservation efforts, possibly leading to enhanced efficiency in household power use.

data.title: SMArtX enables access to semi-liquid alts in model portfolios via proprietary tech, giving direct UMA access. July 31, 2025, West Palm Beach.
data.description: Cutting-edge technology enables direct access to semi-liquid alternatives through Interval and Tender Offer Funds within Rep-Directed Sleeves, proprietary models, and third-party portfolios. SMArtX Advisory Solutions, based in West Palm Beach, Florida, announced this advancement on July 31, 2025.

data.title: Industrial Automation Market set to grow at a CAGR of 8.8% from 2025 to 2032, driven by industries seeking productivity and efficiency improvements. SkyQuest Technology Consulting reports from Westford, Mass.
data.description: The industrial automation sector is projected to experience significant growth in the coming years due to the strong focus of industries and manufacturing on enhancing productivity and efficiency. Located in WESTFORD, Mass., on July 31, 2025, SkyQuest Technology announced this trend. The market is expected to see a substantial increase in revenue, with experts predicting a growth rate of X% annually over the next five years. This growth is driven by the increasing adoption of automation technologies in various industries, with the market expected to reach a value of $Y billion by 2030.
